text_original: Heaven is long-enduring and earth continues long.
text_normalized: Heaven is long-enduring and earth continues long.

text_original: The reason why heaven and earth are able to endure and continue thus long is because they do not live of, or for, themselves.
text_normalized: The reason why heaven and earth are able to endure and continue thus long is because they do not live of, or for, themselves.

text_original: This is how they are able to continue and endure.
text_normalized: This is how they are able to continue and endure.

text_original: Therefore the sage puts his own person last, and yet it is found in the foremost place;
text_normalized: Therefore the sage puts his own person last, and yet it is found in the foremost place;

text_original: he treats his person as if it were foreign to him, and yet that person is preserved.
text_normalized: he treats his person as if it were foreign to him, and yet that person is preserved.

text_original: Is it not because he has no personal and private ends, that therefore such ends are realised?
text_normalized: Is it not because he has no personal and private ends, that therefore such ends are realised?
